properties.description: Inserts the shifts and payroll data to stage tables for the previous week, with WE being Sunday

activities.name: Set DateString
activities.description: Sets the date string used for Dataset property

activities.name: Removed edited Paylines
activities.description: Deletes the payline records that are not present in the newly staged data. Limit delete records to the shifts we just staged, and delete those paylines that aren't present in the new paylines staged data

scripts.text:
DELETE
FROM Sona.PayLines
WHERE 

EXISTS --Limit to the shifts we have exported data for (weekly data)
(
    SELECT 1
    FROM Sona.STG_Shifts AS ss
    WHERE ss.shift_id = PayLines.shift_id
)
AND NOT EXISTS --Exclude paylines that match paylines and shifts just exported and staged
(
    SELECT 1
    FROM Sona.STG_PayLines AS sp
    WHERE sp.shift_id = PayLines.shift_id
      AND sp.PayLines_id = PayLines.PayLine_id
)

source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT  [PayLines_id]
      ,[comment]
      ,[entry_type]
      ,[variant]
      ,[user_id]
      ,[duration_in_minutes]
      ,[start_datetime]
      ,CAST([start_datetime] AS DATE) AS [start_date]
      ,[end_datetime]
      ,CAST([end_datetime] AS DATE) AS [end_date]
      ,[is_sleep]
      ,[shift_id]
      ,[pay_type]
      ,[rate_of_pay_id]
      ,TRY_CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(rate, '£', ''), ',', '') AS decimal(10,2)) AS rate
      ,[rate_of_pay_pay_type]
  FROM [Sona].[STG_PayLines]

SELECT  [active]
      ,[EmploymentPeriods_id]
      ,[start_date]
      ,[idx]
      ,[job_id]
      ,[organisation_id]
      ,[user_id]
      ,[finish_date]
      ,[organisation_user_id]
      ,[employment_specs_id]

      ,[employment_specs_contracted_hours_period]
      ,[employment_specs_contracted_hours_hours]

      ,[employment_specs_contracted_hours_rolling_period_sequence_length_days]
      ,[employment_specs_contracted_hours_rolling_period_sequence_start]

      ,TRY_CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE([employment_specs_rates_of_pay_rate], '£', ''), ',', '') AS decimal(10,2)) AS [employment_specs_rates_of_pay_rate]

      ,[starter_declaration]
      ,[student_loan_plan_four]
      ,[student_loan_plan_one]
      ,[student_loan_plan_two]
      ,[student_loan_post_graduate]
      ,[tupe]
  FROM [Sona].[STG_EmploymentPeriods]

sqlReaderQuery.value: SELECT HOME_REF, HomeName, IntranetID FROM ColdHarbourHomeID WHERE HOME_REF = '@{variables('Home_Ref')}'

SELECT
    ID
    ,AEMS_ID
    ,aems_version
    ,homeID
    ,uploadedBy
    ,managerEmailed
    ,enquiryStatus
    ,enquiryID
    ,initialEnquiry
    ,enquirerSalutation
    ,enquirerLastName AS enquirerFirstName
    ,enquirerFirstName AS enquirerLastName 
    ,enquirerSalutationTwo
    ,enquirerLastNameTwo 
    ,enquirerFirstNameTwo 
    ,enquiryDate
    ,enquirerRelationshipToResident
    ,en_areacode
    ,enquirerTelephone 
    ,enquiry_mobile 
    ,enquirerEmail 
    ,enquirerAddress  AS nokAddress
    ,enquirerAddressOne AS nokAddressOne
    ,enquirerAddressTwo  AS nokAddressTwo
    ,enquirerAddressThree  AS nokAddressThree 
    ,enquiry_postcode 
    ,enquiry_postcode_two 
    ,residentSalutation
    ,residentFirstName 
    ,residentLastName 
    ,residentDOB 
    ,residentSalutationTwo
    ,residentFirstNameTwo
    ,residentLastNameTwo
    ,residentDOBTwo
    ,residentNOK
    ,residentAddress 
    ,residentAddressOne 
    ,residentAddressTwo 
    ,residentAddressThree 
    ,residentPostcode 
    ,residentTelephone 
    ,residentCareCategory
    ,residentFundingCategory
    ,residentCareCategoryTwo
    ,funding_total
    ,residentFunding
    ,residentFundingTwo
    --,enquiryDetails 
    ,REPLACE(CONVERT(VARCHAR(MAX), enquiryDetails), '"', '') AS enquiryDetails
    ,enquiryType
    ,responseTime
    ,responseCurrentStatus
    ,responseNeeded
    ,responseAmountTried
    ,followUpDate
    ,followUpReason
    ,uploadToCH
    ,admissionDate

    ,homeVisit
    ,assessmentBooked

    ,admissionBooked

    ,nok_name
    ,nok_surname
    ,nok_county
    ,nok_relation
    ,nok_telephone
    ,nok_mobile
    ,nok_address
    ,resident_county
    ,nok_Salutation

    ,column_hash
    ,receiveMarketing
    ,willTopUp

FROM 
    AEMS.AEMS_Enquiries AS E
WHERE 
    E.homeID IN (@{variables('IntranetID')})

SELECT 
    A.ID
    ,A.AEMS_ID
    ,enquiry_setBy
    ,enquiry_id
    ,enquiry_dateRequired
    ,enquiry_reason
    ,enquiry_contact
    ,enquiry_actionComplete
    ,enquiry_actionInserted
    ,enquiry_actionCompleteDate
    ,enquiry_actionCompleteBy
    ,enquiry_homeID
    ,enquiry_missed
    ,enquiry_missedEmail
    ,enquiry_missedEmailDate
    ,enquiry_initialContact
    ,enquiry_flag
    ,enquiry_critical
    --,REPLACE(enquiry_details, '"', '')
    ,REPLACE(CONVERT(VARCHAR(MAX), enquiry_details), '"', '') AS enquiry_details
    ,enquiry_picked_up
    ,enquiry_assigned_to
    ,enquiry_assigned_when
    ,enquiry_action_call_handler
    ,enquiry_new
FROM 
    AEMS.AEMS_Enquiries_Actions AS A

    INNER JOIN AEMS.AEMS_Enquiries AS E
        ON E.AEMS_ID = A.enquiry_id
        AND E.homeID = A.enquiry_homeID
    WHERE
        A.enquiry_homeID IN (@{variables('IntranetID')})
SELECT HOME_REF, HomeName, IntranetID FROM ColdHarbourHomeID WHERE HOME_REF = '@{variables('Home_Ref')}'

SELECT
    R.ID,
    R.Assesment_Date,
    R.Status,
    R.Homename,
    R.Intranet,
    R.Res_No,
    --R.Res_First_Name,
    REPLACE(R.Res_First_Name, '"', '') AS Res_First_Name,
    R.Res_Surname,
    R.Unit,
    R.Room_No,
    R.Type,
    R.Total_Standard_Score AS Total_Service_Duration,

    Q1.Service_Description AS Service1_Description,
    r.Q1_Score AS Service1_Score,
    r.Q1_Standard_Score AS Service1_MinutesRequired,
    Q1.Support_Description AS Service1_SupportDescription,
    
    Q2.Service_Description AS Service2_Description,
    r.Q2_Score AS Service2_Score,
    r.Q2_Standard_Score AS Service2_MinutesRequired,
    Q2.Support_Description AS Service2_SupportDescription,

    Q3.Service_Description AS Service3_Description,
    r.Q3_Score AS Service3_Score,
    r.Q3_Standard_Score AS Service3_MinutesRequired,
    Q3.Support_Description AS Service3_SupportDescription,

    Q4.Service_Description AS Service4_Description,
    r.Q4_Score AS Service4_Score,
    r.Q4_Standard_Score AS Service4_MinutesRequired,
    Q4.Support_Description AS Service4_SupportDescription,

    Q5.Service_Description AS Service5_Description,
    r.Q5_Score AS Service5_Score,
    r.Q5_Standard_Score AS Service5_MinutesRequired,
    Q5.Support_Description AS Service5_SupportDescription,

    Q6.Service_Description AS Service6_Description,
    r.Q6_Score AS Service6_Score,
    r.Q6_Standard_Score AS Service6_MinutesRequired,
    Q6.Support_Description AS Service6_SupportDescription,

    Q7.Service_Description AS Service7_Description,
    r.Q7_Score AS Service7_Score,
    r.Q7_Standard_Score AS Service7_MinutesRequired,
    Q7.Support_Description AS Service7_SupportDescription,

    Q8.Service_Description AS Service8_Description,
    r.Q8_Score AS Service8_Score,
    r.Q8_Standard_Score AS Service8_MinutesRequired,
    Q8.Support_Description AS Service8_SupportDescription,

    Q9.Service_Description AS Service9_Description,
    r.Q9_Score AS Service9_Score,
    r.Q9_Standard_Score AS Service9_MinutesRequired,
    Q9.Support_Description AS Service9_SupportDescription,

    Q10.Service_Description AS Service10_Description,
    r.Q10_Score AS Service10_Score,
    r.Q10_Standard_Score AS Service10_MinutesRequired,
    Q10.Support_Description AS Service10_SupportDescription,

    Q11.Service_Description AS Service11_Description,
    r.Q11_Score AS Service11_Score,
    r.Q11_Standard_Score AS Service11_MinutesRequired,
    Q11.Support_Description AS Service11_SupportDescription,

    Q12.Service_Description AS Service12_Description,
    r.Q12_Score AS Service12_Score,
    r.Q12_Standard_Score AS Service12_MinutesRequired,
    Q12.Support_Description AS Service12_SupportDescription,

    Q13.Service_Description AS Service13_Description,
    r.Q13_Score AS Service13_Score,
    r.Q13_Standard_Score AS Service13_MinutesRequired,
    Q13.Support_Description AS Service13_SupportDescription
FROM 
    Dependency_Tool_Responses AS R

    LEFT JOIN Dependency_Tool AS Q1
        ON Q1.Support_Level = R.Q1_Score
        AND Q1.Service_Number = 1

    LEFT JOIN Dependency_Tool AS Q2
        ON Q2.Support_Level = R.Q2_Score
        AND Q2.Service_Number = 2

    LEFT JOIN Dependency_Tool AS Q3
        ON Q3.Support_Level = R.Q3_Score
        AND Q3.Service_Number = 3

    LEFT JOIN Dependency_Tool AS Q4
        ON Q4.Support_Level = R.Q4_Score
        AND Q4.Service_Number = 4

    LEFT JOIN Dependency_Tool AS Q5
        ON Q5.Support_Level = R.Q5_Score
        AND Q5.Service_Number = 5

    LEFT JOIN Dependency_Tool AS Q6
        ON Q6.Support_Level = R.Q6_Score
        AND Q6.Service_Number = 6

    LEFT JOIN Dependency_Tool AS Q7
        ON Q7.Support_Level = R.Q7_Score
        AND Q7.Service_Number = 7

    LEFT JOIN Dependency_Tool AS Q8
        ON Q8.Support_Level = R.Q8_Score
        AND Q8.Service_Number = 8

    LEFT JOIN Dependency_Tool AS Q9
        ON Q9.Support_Level = R.Q9_Score
        AND Q9.Service_Number = 9

    LEFT JOIN Dependency_Tool AS Q10
        ON Q10.Support_Level = R.Q10_Score
        AND Q10.Service_Number = 10

    LEFT JOIN Dependency_Tool AS Q11
        ON Q11.Support_Level = R.Q11_Score
        AND Q11.Service_Number = 11

    LEFT JOIN Dependency_Tool AS Q12
        ON Q12.Support_Level = R.Q12_Score
        AND Q12.Service_Number = 12

    LEFT JOIN Dependency_Tool AS Q13
        ON Q13.Support_Level = R.Q13_Score
        AND Q13.Service_Number = 13
WHERE 
    --R.Status = 'Active' 
    R.Intranet IN (@{variables('IntranetID')})
ORDER BY 
    Intranet ASC, 
    Assesment_Date ASC

SELECT
    HOME_REF,
    MCM_CommunityID,
    HomeName
FROM 
    [dbo].[ColdHarbourHomeID]
WHERE
    MCM_CommunityID IS NOT NULL
    AND HOME_REF IN (@{variables('Home_Ref_List')})

properties.description: Loads the monthly Compliance report to stage and updates compliance table and inserts snapshot of the compliance data into snapshot table. Ran manually due to the delivery of the report from Yourhippo needing to be manually donwloaded.

source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT
    E.HomeID,
    D.Homename,
    MAX(C.Staff) AS StaffCount,
    --C.ComplianceScore,
    --TRY_CONVERT(NUMERIC(4,2), REPLACE(C.ComplianceScore,)
    MAX(TRY_CONVERT(NUMERIC(4,2),REPLACE(C.ComplianceScore, '%', '')) / 100) AS ComplianceScore
FROM 
    YourHippo.STG_MonthlyCompliance AS C

    LEFT JOIN YourHippo.Entity AS E
        ON E.EntityName = C.Entity

    LEFT JOIN Avery.HomeDetails AS D
        ON D.HomeID = E.HomeID
WHERE
    D.HomeID IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY
    E.HomeID,
    D.Homename

DECLARE @Now AS DATETIME = GETDATE()
DECLARE @SnapShotDate AS DATE = DATEADD(DAY, -1, @Now)

SELECT
    --@SnapShotDate AS SnapShotDate, --Using Parameter in Pipeline as will be run manually
    @Now AS SnapShotTaken,
    E.HomeID,
    D.Homename,
    MAX(C.Staff) AS StaffCount,
    --C.ComplianceScore,
    --TRY_CONVERT(NUMERIC(4,2), REPLACE(C.ComplianceScore,)
    MAX(TRY_CONVERT(NUMERIC(4,2),REPLACE(C.ComplianceScore, '%', '')) / 100) AS ComplianceScore
FROM 
    YourHippo.STG_MonthlyCompliance AS C

    LEFT JOIN YourHippo.Entity AS E
        ON E.EntityName = C.Entity

    LEFT JOIN Avery.HomeDetails AS D
        ON D.HomeID = E.HomeID
WHERE
    D.HomeID IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY
    E.HomeID,
    D.Homename

properties.description: Deletes files older than 4 days from the archive to prevent build up
Moves the user and result files to Fileshare to be combined by a python script in the VM. Moves Verification files to another folder.
Moves the merged user and result file back to YourHippo container.
